recipes.title: Powerhouse Almond Matcha Superfood Smoothie
recipes.summarys: A nutrient-packed green smoothie perfect for a quick healthy breakfast.
cookingInstructions: Add 1 cup almond milk to blender
Add 1 tsp matcha powder, 1 frozen banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, and 1 tsp chia seeds
Pour into 2 glasses and serve immediately

recipes.title: Butternut Squash Frittata
recipes.summarys: Oven-baked frittata loaded with roasted squash and herbs.
cookingInstructions: In a pan, heat 1 tbsp olive oil and sauté squash for 3 minutes
In a bowl, beat 3 eggs with salt, pepper, and herbs
Add sautéed squash to egg mixture and pour into greased oven-safe pan
Bake for 20–25 minutes until eggs are set and top is golden

recipes.title: Finger Foods: Frittata Muffins
recipes.summarys: Mini egg muffins packed with vegetables and cheese.
cookingInstructions: In a bowl, whisk 4 eggs with 1/4 cup milk, salt, and pepper
Add chopped bell peppers and cheese to the mixture
Pour mixture evenly into muffin cups
Bake for 20 minutes or until muffins are set

recipes.title: Classic Pancakes
recipes.summarys: Fluffy homemade pancakes perfect for a quick breakfast.
cookingInstructions: In a bowl mix flour, sugar and baking powder
Whisk in milk, egg and melted butter
Heat a lightly oiled skillet over medium heat
Cook until bubbles form then flip

recipes.title: Banana Oatmeal Bowl
recipes.summarys: Creamy oatmeal topped with fresh banana slices.
cookingInstructions: Bring milk to a gentle boil

Top with banana slices and honey

recipes.title: Chewy Brownie Bites
recipes.summarys: Mini bite-sized chocolate brownies.
cookingInstructions: Grease or line a mini muffin tray
Melt 1/2 cup butter in a pan
In a bowl, mix melted butter with 1 cup sugar and 2 eggs
Add 1/3 cup cocoa powder, 1/2 cup flour, 1/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp baking powder
Spoon batter into muffin cups and bake 12–15 minutes
Cool completely and remove from tray
